title: rottlera inophyllum
intro: Rottlera inophyllum, also known as "Khara Jadi" or "Mukul", is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of a triterpenoid saponin called "mukulol", which has been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rottlera inophyllum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, prevent cardiovascular diseases, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rottlera inophyllum are often made into capsules, tablets, or extracts, and are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
